bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=institute-diagnostician (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 25 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-29 · [research_task] Map Fed-minutes tail probability to rate path

DONE · owner=chief-economist

Map the 30% implied 2027Q1 hike probability and the 35% probability of UST 10Y breaking 4.65% into a single chief-economist rate path. Refer to Section 2.

  • Outcome: mailbox=ec5f1cf9-1ddb-44c4-a8dd-cc6b490bfcc3 not found (treat as closed)

2026-05-29 · [research_task] Translate aerospace supply chain mismatch into A-share signals

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

The Chief Strategist should translate the US-China aerospace supply chain mismatch into actionable mid-to-short-term sector allocation and style rotation signals for the A-share market. (Source: Next Steps)

  • Outcome: mailbox=af560f23-8ace-4f0f-a5df-0060c91afa95 not found (treat as closed)

2026-05-29 · [fact_correction] 修正2026年6月美联储降息预期

DONE

The expectation of a 25 basis point (bps) interest rate cut by the US Federal Reserve in June 20 26 is contradicted by prevailing market data as of May 14, 2026.

  • Outcome: mailbox=b8867983-d99b-4bcd-920f-25a56c44e249 not found (treat as closed)

2026-05-29 · [research_task] 流动性边际变化分析

DONE · owner=global-macro · research discussion=流动性边际变化分析 (led by global-macro)

核实今日 MOC 买单集中在科技股是否与近期海外主权基金的调仓有关，并评估是否存在潜在的跨市场流动性紧缩风险。

  • Outcome: research discussion "流动性边际变化分析" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 并购潮使长尾企业向Tier-1集中，推动先进封装资本开支提升约40%，但由于Tier-1严格的ROI考核，80%的探索性研发路线将被砍掉，无法对冲技术断层风险。 | → 12 forecast(s) on SOFR,CFTC,IORB,WFT,HKEX, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 12 (0 positions); tickers: SOFR, CFTC, IORB, WFT, HKEX, MLF

2026-05-29 · [research_task] 统一运费对 CPI 传导的口径

IN_PROGRESS · owner=global-macro · research discussion=统一运费对 CPI 传导的口径 (led by global-macro)

解决 +20至+32 bps 与 +24至+32 bps 的内部口径差异，统一 Drewry WCI 等运费数据对 8-12 月核心 CPI 的 bps 传导口径，并说明对 2026 Q4 降息路径的影响 (Section 5)

  • Status: in progress

  • Forecasts: 4 (0 positions); tickers: IC, IM, SOE, PV

2026-05-29 · [research_task] 确认 A 股尾盘 MOC 成交与雪球对 冲量

IN_PROGRESS · owner=ashare-strategist

请在收盘后确认今日 14:57-15:00 MOC 实际成交、主动外资抛售规模、科创 50 1750/1720 附近雪球对冲量，以区分尾盘交易冲击与基本面信号 (Section 5)

  • Status: in progress

2026-05-29 · [research_task] 调查零售流量与货运量的背离

DONE · owner=chief-strategist · research discussion=调查零售流量与货运量的背离 (led by chief-strategist)

Placer.ai 显示商场流量强劲增长，但 FreightWaves 货运量萎缩。需调查这种‘人热货冷’的背离是否意味着传统的货运领先指标已失效，以及对 Q3 宏观增长预测的修正意义。

  • Outcome: research discussion "调查零售流量与货运量的背离" → failed | cards=6 | error: [watchdog] running > 30m, no callback | → 6 forecast(s) on 09988.HK,03690.HK,09618.HK,00981.HK,RFID, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 6 (0 positions); tickers: 09988.HK, 03690.HK, 09618.HK, 00981.HK, RFID, UPS

2026-05-27 · [coverage_followup] Add CFETS RMB Index weekly change and CNH-CNY basis series in CNY section

DONE

Section 5: Add the complete official 2026-05-15 CFETS value and fuller CNH-CNY basis series; if unavailable, label 'current-account support' as an inference.

  • Outcome: research:CNY,CNH → completed | dir=sessions/e51b4902-9fe9-4d2c-bfe3-21440a669340 | summary: CNY,CNH并非上市公司、基金或经营性法人主体；CNY是人民币官方ISO货币代码，CNH是外汇市场用于表示离岸人民币交易的市场术语，不是官方ISO货币代码。[S1][S2] 因此，本报告不设股票每股目标价，不使用EPS、P/E、P/B、EV/EBITDA或DCF股权现金流；所有“目标价”均指人民币多头敞口下的USD/CNH外汇情景锚。[S1][S2][S3][自测算] | → 1 forecast(s) on CNY,CNH, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: CNY, CNH

2026-05-27 · [coverage_followup] Add German Bund or ECB OIS data for 2026-05-15 in EUR/USD section

DONE

Section 5: Add data for 20026-05-15; if unavailable, soften wording from 'rate differentials led' to 'available evidence points to USD rates...'

  • Outcome: research:EUR/USD → completed | dir=sessions/059cbdf0-0f78-4529-9902-c44ee28478b4 | summary: EUR/USD 是欧元兑美元外汇货币对，不是公司、股票或经营主体；欧洲中央银行在 2026年5月22日列示 USD 参考汇率为 1.1595，且说明其欧元外汇参考汇率以欧元为基础货币报价。[S1] 因此，本报告把“评级”定义为 EUR/USD 多头/空头观点，把“目标价”定义为 12个月 EUR/USD 汇率目标，而不使用 EPS、PE、PB、EV/EBITDA 或股权 DCF 作为有效估值方法。[S1][S2][自测算] | → 1 forecast(s) on EUR/USD, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: EUR/USD

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Reconcile freight fundamentals with equity pricing

DONE

Investigate why tightening freight fundamentals (DAT/BlueGrace) are not being confirmed by transport equities like IYT, FDX, and UPS, as highlighted in Section 1.

  • Outcome: research:IYT, FDX, UPS → failed | error: upstream status: failed

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Verify restaurant bifurcation trend

DONE

Examine CAVA 2026-05-19 earnings (transactions, throughput, mix) to see if rising fast-casual traffic suggests a preference for CAVA/CMG-style brands over legacy QSR, per Section 4.

  • Outcome: research:CAVA → failed | error: upstream status: failed

2026-05-27 · [research_task] Trace QUCY trading data to original market source

DONE

Trace social-side price, volume, and RSI figures to original market-data source because TMT rejected listed equity existence (Ref: Questions Still Pending Verification).

  • Outcome: research:QUCY → completed | dir=sessions/75acfbdb-23d0-4c67-8cd8-693c92cb1cc4 | summary: 投资结论为强卖，原因有三点：第一，QUCY 在 2026 年一季度继续经营收入为 $0、继续经营亏损为 $(2,485,595)、现金流量表口径期末现金为 $4,752,966，说明当前基本面仍处于商业验证前阶段。[S1] 第二，David E. Lazar 持有可转换为 477,000,000 股普通股的优先股权益，BP United Inc. 许可交易包含 20,000,000 股普通股对价，并另向 Alexander Gurevich 发行 5,000,000 股顾问股份，使完全转换经济股数达到 516,661,169 股。[S3…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: QUCY
